{{Quote|The hum of the vibroblade gave it away. That's the only reason I still have my face.|Pirate Captain Nym|<ref name="NEGWT">''[[The New Essential Guide to Weapons and Technology]]''</ref>}}
The '''Treppus-2 vibroblade''' was a [[Knife/Legends|knife]]-sized melee weapon produced by [[Merr-Sonn Munitions, Inc./Legends|Merr-Sonn Munitions, Inc.]]

==Description==
The Treppus-2 [[Vibroblade/Legends|vibroblade]], manufactured by [[Merr-Sonn Munitions, Inc./Legends|Mer-Sonn]], was a standard [[Knife/Legends|knife]]-sized weapon with a fifteen [[Centimeter/Legends|centimeter]]-long blade. The hilt,<ref name="EGWT" /> which included [[Vibration-dampening handle|vibration-dampening]],<ref name="NEGWT" /> contained the [[Power cell/Legends|power cell]] which generated enough power for up to ten [[Standard hour/Legends|hours]] of operation.<ref name="EGWT" /> An extendible [[Sheath/Legends|sheath]] is located at the base of the blade, allowing it to be covered when not in use. The sheath had diagnostic software and [[Self-sharpening sheath|self-sharpening]] hardware,<ref name="NEGWT" /> and could optionally be fitted with a recharging module.<ref name="EGWT" />

Activating the [[Ultrasonic generator/Legends|ultrasonic vibration generator]] through an activation stud on the hilt started the blade vibrating so quickly it appeared to be a blur. The Treppus-2 could also be configured to activate the vibration generator once the blade had been removed from the sheath. The vibroblade was capable of slicing through [[Duraplast/Legends|duraplast]], [[Ceramic/Legends|ceramic]] [[Armor/Legends|armor]], and [[Metal/Legends|metal]] alloys. The vibration generator made a substantial amount of noise, allowing it to be heard from several [[Meter/Legends|meters]] away. The weapon was balanced so it could be thrown accurately at short distances.<ref name="EGWT" />
